channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Broncos receiver Josh Reynolds recovering from two gunshot wounds after visit to strip club
item.description: ENGLEWOOD, Colo. (AP) — Denver Broncos wide receiver Josh Reynolds is recovering from two gunshot wounds after he and another man were fired upon following a visit to a strip club last week.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NHRA legend John Force will attend a race four months after his traumatic brain injury
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — NHRA legend John Force, who suffered a traumatic brain injury during a harrowing crash at Virginia Motorsports Park in June, has been cleared to attend a race.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New York Liberty players given keys to NYC after WNBA championship win
item.description: NEW YORK CITY (PIX11) -- The entire New York Liberty team was given keys to New York City Thursday after their first-ever WNBA championship win. The honor followed a special ticker-tape parade for the team in Lower Manhattan on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, PIX 11

item.title: New York Liberty basketball team honored with ticker-tape parade in Canyon of Heroes
item.description: Jonquel Jones, Breanna Stewart, Sabrina Ionescu and their New York teammates were showered with confetti as the Liberty celebrated winning the WNBA title in the Canyon of Heroes in downtown Manhattan.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Jimmy Coenraets named permanent Utah Royals head coach
item.description: In a move many people may have expected, the Utah Royals have named interim head coach Jimmy Coenraets as permanent head coach.
item.dc:creator: Stockton Mair, ABC 4

item.title: Lifelong 'rivals' recall love and admiration for pitching legend Fernando Valenzuela
item.description: "Nobody will ever do what he did, we lost a living legend, he was me, he was you, he was our brothers, sisters, cousins, he was us," said Hernandez. "He represented us, he looked like us, talked like us, acted like us, and the loss is for every single one of us.
item.dc:creator: Salvador Rivera, NewsNation

item.title: NBA opens investigation into Joel Embiid's playing status after 76ers star misses season opener
item.description: The NBA is investigating why Philadelphia center Joel Embiid did not play in the team's nationally televised season opener against Milwaukee. The league confirmed the investigation on Thursday. It was opened as part of the NBA's player participation policy that went into effect last season.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jason Kelce calls on the NFL to do more research into the long-term effects of concussions
item.description: Jason Kelce called on the NFL to do more research into the long-term effects of concussions ahead of Tua Tagovailoa's return to play, during a recent episode of "New Heights.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles' Saquon Barkley sacrifices opportunity to set career-high against former team
item.description: Eagles star Saquon Barkley put his personal aspirations to the side during his return to MetLife Stadium. He finished the game vs. the Giants just 13 yards shy of his career high.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Parent of WWE and UFC is buying Professional Bull Riders, On Location and IMG for $3.25 billion
item.description: TKO Group, the sports entertainment company that houses WWE and UFC, is buying Professional Bull Riders, On Location, and IMG from Endeavor Group in an all-stock deal valued at $3.25 billion.
item.dc:creator: Michelle Chapman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Ja Morant "excited to be back" after successful season debut, injury return in Grizzlies' win
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — Ja Morant’s ability to take over a game hasn’t diminished. Morant didn’t miss a beat in leading the Memphis Grizzlies to a 126-124 season-opening victory over the Utah Jazz on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: JOHN COON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Healthy LaMelo Ball shines in 1st game since January, scoring 34 points in Hornets' win
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — LaMelo Ball looked like the superstar that nagging ankle injuries have kept him from being for most of the last two seasons in Charlotte’s opener on Wednesday night. Playing in a regular-season game for the first time since Jan.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shohei Ohtani’s 50/50 ball shatters record for most expensive in sports history
item.description: Ohtani became the first player in the sport’s history to hit 50 home runs and steal 50 bases in a season, doing so on Sept. 19 against the Miami Marlins.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, NewsNation

item.title: Dodgers phenom Fernando Valenzuela dies at 63
item.description: Fernando Valenzuela, the Mexican-born phenom for the Los Angeles Dodgers who inspired “Fernandomania” while winning the NL Cy Young Award and Rookie of the Year in 1981, has died.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
